title: phlox opalensis
intro: Phlox opalensis, also known as the fragrant phlox, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox genus, native to eastern Asia. It is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlox opalensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Phlox opalensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
